name: Korat city core
notes: Provincial capital and strongest baseline urban node in the province.

name: Pak Chong gateway town
notes: Major Mittraphap corridor gateway between Bangkok

name: Sikhio district center
notes: Service town on the Mittraphap corridor between Pak Chong and Korat city.

name: Dan Khun Thot district center
notes: Western district service node on the Route 201 and interdistrict connector side.

name: Chok Chai district center
notes: Important southern district center with agri-service and local market demand.

name: Phimai district center
notes: Historic district center and eastern service town with tourism and community relevance.

name: Bua Yai district center
notes: Northern service town on the rail and highway axis toward Khon Kaen and Chaiyaphum.

name: Non Sung district center
notes: Secondary east-side district node supporting province-wide coverage.
